seoTitle: East Innisfail vs East Mackay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Innisfail and East Mackay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Innisfail vs East Mackay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Innisfail and East Mackay.
heading: East Innisfail vs East Mackay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Innisfail, Queensland and East Mackay, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Innisfail has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to East Mackay (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Innisfail or East Mackay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Innisfail has a flood risk score of 47/100, while East Mackay scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Innisfail scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. East Mackay scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Innisfail or East Mackay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Innisfail has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
